name: decky-ssh-toggle
description: Decky plugin to toggle SSH on the Steam Deck

scripts.build:docker: docker run --rm -v "$(pwd):/plugin" -w /plugin node:lts-alpine sh -c "npm install -g pnpm && pnpm install && pnpm build"
scripts.pack: npm run build:docker && zip -r decky-ssh-toggle.zip dist/index.js dist/index.js.map main.py plugin.json package.json

author: NeonPimpZ
